use_cases: Indicating loading state during data fetching operations
Showing progress during async API calls
Enhancing button states during action processing
Displaying page or section transition states
ai_summary: A lightweight, customizable circular loading spinner component featuring 12 animated bars arranged radially. The component uses CSS animations for a smooth, continuous rotation effect and accepts size and color props for easy theming. It's a universal feedback component suitable for any industry or platform requiring loading state indication, from SaaS dashboards to e-commerce checkout flows.
